name: themeplus
description: A modern theme options framework for WordPress
author: Faruk Ahmed

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run pot && rm -rf package/themeplus && rm -f package/themeplus.zip && mkdir -p package/themeplus && rsync -av --exclude-from='.distignore' . package/themeplus && cd package && zip -r themeplus.zip themeplus && rm -rf themeplus && echo '✅ package/themeplus.zip ready!'
